arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag 'wanted to stay at Man Utd for 10 years' as Old Trafford plan revealed
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was sacked as Manchester United boss in October and one of his former coaches has revealed the Dutchman was planning to remain at Old Trafford "for the next 10 years"

arts.ttl: Manchester City challenging Arsenal for €25m La Liga star
arts.sum: The La Liga market is one that Premier League have increasingly looked to in recent years, and the expectation is that this will continue in 2025 for the summer transfer window. There are an abundance of talented younger players in Spanish football that have been linked with moving to England, and one of those is […] The post Manchester City challenging Arsenal for €25m La Liga star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville plays bass guitar in surprise appearance live on stage at Manchester gig just hours before Man United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Just hours before the Sky Sports pundit was due at Old Trafford to provide coverage of Manchester United vs Arsenal. the 50-year-old was seen bouncing around while strumming a bass guitar.

arts.ttl: Arsenal scouting 17-G/A Newcastle & Aston Villa target with a “bright future”
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in signing the highly rated South American forward Santiago Castro from Italian club Bologna at the end of the season. The 20-year-old has done quite well since joining the Italian club in January 2024, and he has picked up nine goals and eight assists in all competitions so far. He has been […] The post Arsenal scouting 17-G/A Newcastle & Aston Villa target with a “bright future” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 6th, Celtic 17th - Which European clubs made the most from kit sales?
arts.sum: Football clubs typically gauge their success in the sport by the number of games and trophies that they’ve won in any given time period, but in the modern game many turn to economic figures...

arts.ttl: Man United drop triple team news hint before Arsenal as Ruben Amorim faces Real Sociedad decision
arts.sum: Man United will be looking for a morale-boosting win against Arsenal on Sunday (4:30pm kick-off) ahead of Thursday's huge Europa League clash against Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: I'm not surprised Rasmus Hojlund had a pop at Diogo Dalot - I experienced the same issue
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund was involved in an angry exchange with Diogo Dalot during Manchester United's 1-1 draw with Real Sociedad, and one ex-Premier League hitman knows exactly how he feels

arts.ttl: Man United handed boost in their pursuit of “top player” with 25 goals this season
arts.sum: Manchester United are keen on signing the Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres at the end of the season. They have now been handed a major boost in their pursuit of the Swedish international.
